findings: SM clock after clear = 1155 MHz — DID NOT RETURN TO 210 MHz
SM stuck at 1155 MHz entire cooldown period
MEM clock = 1593 MHz throughout — never changes
VRAM residual = 463 MB persists through cooldown

security_issues.description: 463 MB persists through entire cooldown monitoring period.

ghost_power_finding: SM stuck at 1155 MHz post-load = Ghost Power State 2. Power 86W at 0pct util indefinitely.
conclusion: SM clock does not recover after FP16 load. Ghost power state 2 confirmed persistent.
